visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A female creator with light makeup, wearing a dark green athletic top, holds a smartphone in a selfie position, smiling broadly at the camera. Next to her, a well-known actress in a tan Gucci-patterned dress with long sleeves smiles and waves toward the lens. The environment is a dimly lit indoor event space illuminated by vibrant pink, purple, and white neon accent lighting. (2) The scene shifts to the creator standing outdoors against a dark grey corrugated metal wall. She is wearing a green short-sleeved top and black shorts, holding a camera on a gimbal and gesturing enthusiastically. Beside her stands a person in a bright pink jumpsuit with a black mask featuring a white circle, representing a guard. (3) Inside a massive industrial-style studio, various people in green tracksuits are seen participating in physical games. A person in a black suit strikes a large green buzzer on a podium. The background is a brightly lit, high-ceilinged warehouse environment with colorful, geometric playground-style decor. (4) On a darkened stage with a large LED screen displaying 'SQUID GAME 3', three actors stand behind microphones. One male actor wears a white and black polo, while the female actress is in her Gucci dress. They hold microphones and speak to a crowded audience of fans who are holding up smartphones to record. (5) In a final sequence, the creator is seen in an indoor bedroom setting, wearing a bright pink button-down shirt. She sits on a bed with a grey padded headboard, looking at a laptop screen off-camera and covering her mouth with her hand in a gesture of extreme shock and joy.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 跟《魷魚遊戲3》朴圭瑛說「我從台灣來」的話，反應是? (2) [Variety]: 抓抓手臂🤣. (3) [Slogan]: 還有驚喜反應喔 (記得看到最後!!!). (4) [Subtitle]: 今天是《魷魚遊戲3》VIP秘密行程第二天. (5) [Subtitle]: 這次我有實際體驗到劇中的各種遊戲!!! (6) [Subtitle]: 在這邊參賽大約6個小時後... (7) [Variety]: 暫時午睡. (8) [Subtitle]: 再來參加《魷魚遊戲3》倒數現場!!! (9) [Subtitle]: 到這完全沒沒想到會見到他們.... (10) [Variety]: (先開心起來). (11) [Variety]: 什麼事???. (12) [Variety]: ★卡司們登場★. (13) [Subtitle]: 姜河那. (14) [Variety]: 哇....本人真的超美的啦. (15) [Subtitle]: 朴圭瑛. (16) [Slogan]: 英文很流利!!! (17) [Slogan]: 為了我們的作品特地來到韓國. (18) [Slogan]: 能夠和大家一起參加開幕活動我真的很開心. (19) [Variety]: 賢珠!!!. (20) [Subtitle]: 朴成焄. (21) [Slogan]: 黑暗榮耀的他沒錯. (22) [Subtitle]: Q. 在拍攝的過程中，有沒有讓你感到特別驚訝的時刻呢?. (23) [Variety]: 我也算真的很安靜!. (24) [Subtitle]: 終於交流時間到了!. (25) [Slogan]: 是可以跟演員們互動的時間，但現場競爭真的太激烈了啦. (26) [Slogan]: 超想跟他聊，但他個性太好了，一直被人家抓著. (27) [Variety]: (旁邊澳洲朋友在跟他聊中). (28) [Subtitle]: 朋友：我真的是你的粉絲!. (29) [Subtitle]: 朴圭瑛：喔! 非常感謝!. (30) [Variety]: (超級高興哈哈哈哈哈). (31) [Variety]: (發現有璟了!!!). (32) [Variety]: 抓有璟手臂 >0< (33) [Variety]: 反應超爆可愛. (34) [Variety]: 竟然又親手抓有璟. (35) [Variety]: (到最後超熱情!). (36) [Variety]: (還不知道自己被她摸到). (37) [Slogan]: (剪輯的時候才發現). (38) [Variety]: 昏倒. (39) [Slogan]: 我這次來韓國之前心理上最想看她，天啊也太巧了吧. (40) [Slogan]: 我真的有被她抓到耶. (41) [Slogan]: 규영언니 사랑해요,,,,❤️

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 2 lead actors (Kang Ha-neul, Park Gyu-young), 1 lead actor (Park Sung-hoon), and at least 20 event attendees and staff.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main creator is a young Asian female with long brown hair, wearing a green top in most scenes and a pink shirt at home. Actress Park Gyu-young wears a high-end Gucci patterned dress. Actor Kang Ha-neul wears a black and white knit polo shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video moves between a neon-lit nightclub-style event space, a sunny outdoor area with industrial metal walls, a large-scale indoor studio set designed like a children's playground, and a private bedroom with soft, neutral lighting.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with high-energy electronic dance music featuring a heavy, driving beat. A female voice speaks with a very high pitch and rapid speech rate, expressing intense excitement. In the background, there is a dense layer of crowd noise, including high-frequency screaming and cheering. (2) A sharp 'ding' sound effect cuts through the music as a text graphic appears. The music remains consistent while the female narrator provides context in a bright, friendly tone with clear articulation. (3) A 'whoosh' sound effect transitions the scene. The ambient noise changes to a larger indoor space with noticeable reverb. A male voice is heard speaking English with a calm, polite delivery, asking 'How are you?'. A massive crowd response of 'Good!' follows immediately at a high volume. (4) A melodic, bubbly synthesizer sound effect triggers a transition. A female actress speaks into a microphone with a soft, melodic tone, alternating between English and Korean. The BGM ducks in volume to allow her speech to be the primary signal. (5) Fast-paced comic sound effects, including a 'pop' and a slide-whistle-like effect, sync with on-screen text. The female vlogger's voice returns with even higher arousal, laughing and shouting in delight. (6) The music transitions to a slightly softer, more playful beat. The vlogger's voice becomes more intimate and breathless as she reacts to a specific video clip, punctuated by sharp gasps and celebratory exclamations. The background is relatively quiet, focusing on her vocal reactions.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Event Experience -> Fan Interaction -> Post-Event Reflection
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a lifestyle and promotional vlog documenting a creator's participation in an exclusive Netflix 'Squid Game 3' VIP promotional event. It highlights the interactive sets, the presence of lead actors Kang Ha-neul and Park Gyu-young, and a personal fan interaction moment that the creator later discovers while editing. The intent is to share fan excitement and provide a behind-the-scenes look at the series' marketing event.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Clear branding for 'Squid Game 3' and Netflix throughout the event space, including on stage, on screens, and mentioned in the subtitles.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-energy social media vlog with dense text overlays and rapid editing, typical of East Asian viral short-form content. The emotional peak is the unexpected physical interaction with a celebrity.
